title: zanthoxylum ocumarense
intro: Zanthoxylum ocumarense, also known as the Ocumareño prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Zanthoxylum, native to the coastal regions of Venezuela and Trinidad. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum ocumarense include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Zanthoxylum ocumarense may be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
